tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
  Hey, yeah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
(That's just for fun) (What?)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
   Ah[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm not one to stick around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
One strike and you're out, baby[/tab]

Don't care if I sound crazy
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
But you never let me down, no, no[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
That's why when the sun's up I'm stayin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Still layin' in your bed sayin'[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Got all this time on our hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Might as well cancel our plans, yeah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I could stay here for a lifetime[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
So, lock the door and throw out the key[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Can't fight this no more, it's just you and me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
And there's nothin' I, nothin' I, I can do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                         
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
So, go ahead and drive me insane[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, run your mouth, I still wouldn't change[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Being stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                        
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you, baby[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
There's nowhere we need to be, no, no, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I'ma get to know you better[/tab]

Kinda hope we're here forever
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]               
There's nobody on these streets[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
If you told me that the world's endin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Ain't no other way that I can spend it[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Got all this time in my hands[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
Might as well cancel our plans[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I could stay here forever[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
So, lock the door and throw out the key[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Can't fight this no more, it's just you and me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
And there's nothin' I, nothin' I, I can do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                         
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
So, go ahead and drive me insane[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, run your mouth, I still wouldn't change[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Being stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                         
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]


[tab][Bridge]
[ch]C[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, come take all my time[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Go on, make me lose my mind[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
We got all that we need here tonight[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I lock the door (Lock the door) and throw out the key[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]
Can't fight this no more (Can't fight this no more),[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
it's just you and me and there's nothin' I,[/tab]

nothin' I'd rather do
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
So, go ahead and drive me insane[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, run your mouth, I still wouldn't trade (change)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
All this lovin' you, hatin' you, wantin' you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                         
I'm stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with...[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]                               
You          [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Stuck with you, stuck with you, stuck with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
         (fade out)[/tab]
